overview.description: The Pacer WealthShield ETF (PWS) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Pacer Wealth Shield Total Return index. The fund tracks an index that toggles between equity and Treasurys, or a combination of both, on a monthly basis depending on monthly moving averages. PWS was launched on Dec 11, 2017 and is issued by Pacer.
infoTable: Pacer Wealth Shield Total Return Index
